title: Groundwork of Evangelion 20 vs Evangelion 20 CRC
display_title: Groundwork of Evangelion 20 vs Evangelion 20 CRC
wikitext:
[]: Groundwork of Evangelion 2.0 vs. Evangelion 2.0 CRC             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Jul 06, 2011 6:18 pm Didn't see anything about this on the first couple of pages, so I created a new topic. Mods, please lock and redirect as appropriate if I missed the obvious. Anyway, I noticed that Groundwork for 2.0 was recently released, and I found myself wondering if there's anything to it vs. the CRC. Does it amount to a stripped down version of the CRC, or does it cover separate material? Is there any point to purchasing both? Is it made redundant if one already has (or intends to acquire) the CRC?

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Wed Jul 06, 2011 11:07 pm the Groundwork series of books are all key animation with just the first few pages being official full color illustrations, the CRC books are full of storyboards, interviews, concept art and such.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Jul 07, 2011 5:50 am Nonoriri wrote: the Groundwork series of books are all key animation with just the first few pages being official full color illustrations, the CRC books are full of storyboards, interviews, concept art and such.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 20, 2011 9:57 pm CRC only includes key frame drawings here and there, mostly to supplement concept art or provide examples of an interviewee's work. Groundwork is DEVOTED to key frame drawings.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Jul 21, 2011 5:43 am Reichu wrote: CRC only includes key frame drawings here and there, mostly to supplement concept art or provide examples of an interviewee's work. Groundwork is DEVOTED to key frame drawings.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jul 21, 2011 8:44 am Reichu wrote: CRC only includes key frame drawings here and there, mostly to supplement concept art or provide examples of an interviewee's work.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 21, 2011 9:31 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Would this happen to be in English?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jul 21, 2011 9:57 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Would this happen to be in English?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jul 21, 2011 10:48 am I see. Awesome for 17ect. to do that for us!
